name: Auto-close Pull Request

on:
  pull_request:
    types: [opened]


permissions:
  pull-requests: write

jobs:
  close-pr:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Leave a comment and close PR
        uses: actions/github-script@v7
        with:
          script: |
           
            await github.rest.issues.createComment({
              issue_number: context.issue.number,
              owner: context.repo.owner,
              repo: context.repo.repo,
              body: "Thank you for your Pull Request! Unfortunately, we do not accept PRs in this repository at the moment. This PR will be closed automatically."
            });
            
            
            await github.rest.pulls.update({
              pull_number: context.issue.number,
              owner: context.repo.owner,
              repo: context.repo.repo,
              state: 'closed'
            });
